title: The Light in the Dark
actors: Hope Hampton, E.K. Lincoln, Lon Chaney
plot: Poor Bessie MacGregor is struck by the automobile of wealthy Mrs. Templeton Orrin and is taken home to live with her. But Bessie leaves when Mrs. Orrin's brother, J. Warburton Ashe, trifles with her love. Thief Tony Pantelli befri...
